title: Software Engineer
description: Design, build and maintain web applications using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. 2+ years of experience preferred.

title: Front-End Developer
description: Build responsive, user-friendly interfaces with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and jQuery.

title: Accountant
description: Manage company accounts, prepare monthly financial reports and handle payroll.

title: Marketing Executive
description: Plan and run digital marketing campaigns and manage social media channels.

title: Nursing Officer
description: Provide quality patient care and assist doctors in the medical ward.

title: Data Entry Assistant
description: Enter and verify data accurately. Basic computer knowledge is required.

title: Sales Representative
description: Promote products to customers and achieve monthly sales targets.

title: Lab Technician
description: Collect samples and perform laboratory tests under supervision.

title: Finance Manager
description: Lead the finance team, manage budgets and oversee financial planning.

title: QA Engineer
description: Test web applications, write test cases and report bugs with clear steps.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design clean, modern interfaces and improve the overall user experience.

title: Bank Teller
description: Handle customer transactions and provide friendly front-desk banking service.

title: Content Writer
description: Write clear, engaging articles and marketing copy for the web.

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispense medicines accurately and advise patients on safe usage.

title: Network Engineer
description: Set up and maintain company networks and resolve connectivity issues.
